text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity—caught between the sterile calm of the glass meeting rooms and the vibrant, almost experimental energy of the R+D exhibit. The sharp lines and modern design prompt me to reflect on the nature of progress and human ingenuity. There’s a detached, clinical order juxtaposed with creative exploration. I feel both distant and engaged, as if straddling two worlds: the predictable, orderly present and the restless pursuit of what could be.
